name: Universal Jewelry Pawn and Gun Range
description_short: Family-owned pawn shop since 1987 offering pawn loans, jewelry buying/selling, firearms sales, and a public 6-lane indoor gun range in Brandon, FL.
description_long: Universal Jewelry Pawn and Gun Range has operated as a family-owned business in Brandon, Florida since 1987. The company has established itself as a multi-service financial and retail operation combining traditional pawn lending with specialized retail services. Located at 990 W. Brandon Blvd., the business has become a recognizable community fixture in the Tampa Bay area. The longevity of the operation suggests consistent local presence and customer relationships. The company presents itself as committed to competitive pricing and customer service across all service lines. Universal Jewelry Pawn and Gun Range offers pawn loans (the core collateral-based lending service), jewelry buying and selling with full repair and customization capabilities, firearms sales and transfers, and a public indoor shooting facility. They buy and trade jewelry, tools, instruments, guns, electronics, and items of value. The business explicitly states it will "beat all competitors' prices" and "pays top dollar" for purchased items. Their 6-lane indoor gun range is open to the public and available for shooters who bring their own firearms or rent from inventory. The facility employs NRA-certified instructors offering firearms instruction for all skill levels. What distinguishes this operation is the combination of pawn lending with a functional gun range and firearms retail, which is uncommon among pawn shops. Most traditional pawn operations do not operate shooting ranges or firearms instruction programs. The facility positioning as "clean and comfortable" suggests investment in facility quality. The jewelry repair and customization services indicate depth beyond typical pawn operations. The availability of NRA-certified instruction adds legitimacy and safety credentials. However, like all pawn operations, this company's core lending model is built on collateral-based short-term loans that typically carry high effective interest rates, though APRs are not disclosed on their website. The company is best suited for customers needing immediate cash against tangible assets, firearms enthusiasts seeking range access and instruction, and those interested in buying or selling jewelry and used firearms locally. The pawn model serves as emergency liquidity but is not appropriate for long-term financial planning or debt resolution.
pros: Family-owned operation since 1987 with established local reputation in Brandon, FL
6-lane public indoor gun range with NRA-certified instructors for all skill levels
Full-service jewelry repair and customization in addition to buying/selling
Firearms rental available for range users with valid CWL
Multi-item pawn service (jewelry, tools, instruments, electronics, guns, items of value)
Explicit price-matching guarantee to beat competitors' prices
Convenient hours Monday-Saturday 10am-6pm with accessible location
Immediate cash availability against collateral for short-term liquidity needs
cons: No APR or loan term details disclosed on website; typical pawn rates are significantly higher than conventional lending
Collateral-based lending model creates risk of asset loss if loan cannot be repaid
Limited hours (closed Sundays) and weekend-only Saturday operation may not accommodate all schedules
Gun range services require valid CWL for firearm rental, limiting access for some customers
No online loan application or account management tools mentioned; requires in-person visits
best_for: Firearm enthusiasts and gun owners seeking public range access, equipment rental, and professional instruction
Individuals needing immediate short-term cash against jewelry, electronics, or tools
Jewelry buyers and sellers interested in local retail transaction with repair/customization services
Beginner shooters seeking NRA-certified firearms instruction in a dedicated facility
diagnosis: Universal Jewelry Pawn and Gun Range is best for customers with tangible assets who need quick cash via collateral-based loans, and for firearm enthusiasts seeking range facilities and instruction. Primary caveat: pawn lending carries high effective interest rates and asset forfeiture risk if repayment is missed—this is emergency short-term liquidity, not a sustainable debt solution.
services: Firearm equipment rental with valid CWL
